heading: Persons eligible under prior law
label: 2305 Persons eligible under prior law
text: The death of any person who had a status which would, under the laws in effect on , afford entitlement to the burial benefits and other benefits provided for in this chapter, but who did not meet the service requirements contained in this chapter, shall afford entitlement to such benefits, notwithstanding the failure of such person to meet such service requirements.December 31, 1957
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 905 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 905 of this title
